name: Oscar Piastri | CELEBRITY
description:
🎀 REQUEST! | The flash goes off. The camera captures a second too late— the afterglow of whatever that was.

But I bеt we'd have really good bеd chem / How you pick me up, pull 'em down, turn me 'round

Oh, it just makes sense / How you talk so sweet when you're doin' bad things

That's bed (Bed) chem (Chem)

How you're lookin' at me, yeah, I know what that means / And I'm obsessed

Are you free next week?

sabrina carpenter — bed chem

You step away first, not looking back. But you feel Oscar's gaze on your spine the whole way out of frame. But nothing happens. No lines are crossed. Standards are met. Boundaries are all squarely kept in place.

And that’s the problem, isn’t it?

You’re both good at being professional.

...Suspiciously good.

You can pick your celebrity status (popstar/model/actor/athlete/etc). This is set up to kind of be a teasing will they-won't they slow burn, but you are welcome to flirt right out the gate! Have fun! :)

fixing a request i misread ! hope this suits better, you mentioned sabrina carpenter so i also picked a short 'n sweet song hehe

♡ discord server (please join!) ♡ (requests closed) — tip my ko-fi for priority! ♡
